_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: p38 activation was strongly correlated with pERK expression regardless of tumor type (ρ = 0.70, p = 0.006)
details: Successfully detected phospho-ERK expression showing strong correlation (ρ = 0.70, p = 0.006) with p38 activation in Western blot analysis
